heading: Transfer of rehabilitation loan fund assets and liabilities
label: 1701g–5c Transfer of rehabilitation loan fund assets and liabilities
text: Notwithstanding section 289(c) of the Cranston-Gonzalez National Affordable Housing Act (), the assets and liabilities of the revolving fund established by section 1452b of title 42, and any collections, including repayments or recaptured amounts, of such fund shall be transferred to and merged with the Revolving Fund (liquidating programs), established pursuant to title II of the Independent Offices Appropriation Act, 1955, as amended (), effective .Public Law 101–625112 U.S.C. 1701g–5See References in Text note below.1October 1, 1991
notes: References in TextSection 289(c) of the Cranston-Gonzalez National Affordable Housing Act (), referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.Pub. CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Departments of Veterans Affairs and Housing and Urban Development, and Independent Agencies Appropriations Act, 1992, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.
